CustomField.description: The View Box attribute defines the position and dimension, in user space, of an SVG Viewport. The numbers are separated by spaces. Example: 0 0 50 50.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: The View Box attribute defines the position and dimension, in user space, of an SVG Viewport. The numbers are separated by spaces. Example: 0 0 50 50
CustomField.label: View Box
